assertion_results.text: The post-triage summary comment (Step 8) includes an @mention of the vulnerability issue's reporter using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' (§1.67)

assertion_results.text: The reporter @mention in Step 8 is present by default without any ProdSec configuration — it uses the reporter field from the Jira issue (§1.67)

The same account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' appears in the Step 8 mention on line 49 of remediation.md. The reporter field was sourced from the Jira issue itself, not from any ProdSec configuration.
